subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the recipient of the peerless, resplendent ode and the ancient bounty of the Most Glorious Beauty! A thousand "well dones" and a hundred "bravo"s be unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قابل قصیده فریده غراء و قابل فیض قدیم جمال ابهی احسنت الف احسنت آفرین صد
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @poems and quotation from poetry, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
